reviews.review_description:
Wiped Clean delivers a masterfully structured story paired with intense missions, solid execution, and impressive visuals. You step into the role of an undercover “murder cleaner,” tasked with removing bodies, washing away blood with your Kärcher, disposing of incriminating evidence, and don't be nosy or you might be the next one cleaned.

The game keeps delivering, with frequent updates that continually raise the bar. The most recent pushed the experience to its limits, though I still hope to be surprised again. Expect plenty of twists and challenges along the way, making every mission unique.

Immersive, suspenseful, and deeply satisfying, Wiped Clean is a full, polished VR experience that’s absolutely worth playing. Highly recommended.
Although there are still small lags, but the atmosphere and full immersion interrupts all this moments, which I am sure will soon be corrected

reviews.review_title: Needs a few additions for comfort!
reviews.review_description:
I've just gone through the first level of the game and I've found a couple of things that NEED to be added. 
Firstly let us adjust our height! I have to play sitting down, so I'm stuck at the height of a child, which makes reaching for code pads a bit difficult . 
Secondly where is left handed mode? I want to use the jet in my left hand but it won't work unless it's in my right, which is annoying to say the least!
Third you need a teleport movement option! Some of us get motion sick after a while and it would make it a lot more comfortable to play. 

I know this is still a game in progress, but these changes would improve it tenfold!

Not terrible. I understand it's in the early phases with supposedly huge updates coming soon. I'm debating on refunding it until the updates are actually implemented. Plus it's a bit pricey as it stands right now for me. I know it's not Crime Scene Cleaner on Steam, but that's definitely what it seems to want to mimic, which is totally cool with me if u can pull it off. But if that's the case, y'all got a long way to go.
Kinda weird that a game about cleaning crime scenes is satisfying. But I like it :)

reviews.review_title: Chill but fun crime scene game
reviews.review_description: If Powerwash Simulator, Hide the Corpse, and Thief Simulator coding got jumbled together, you’ll get Wiped Clean. Clean, collect, dispose, repeat. This early access story-driven game has five crime scenes to clean up. Discover clues to take down the hitman but don’t become a target yourself. Wiped Clean is currently EARLY ACCESS so there will be more to come. I struggled in the beginning to retrieve my backpack but once I found the sweet spot, the game was on. The game is chill with a few surprises. I love having the Huskie as a sidekick and the earned upgrades. Very helpful. Check out my walkthrough video on YT @misschiefvr

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive feedback and we are very happy to know that you enjoyed the game :)

reviews.review_description: Never mind i just beat it love the game!

Just finished playing this for a review and I have to say it’s nothing groundbreaking graphics wise , But the idea of cleaning up murder sites is a great concept , 

Great voice acting and interesting storytelling keeps you playing

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing wiped clean and glad you enjoyed the game :)

reviews.review_description:
An hour or so in the game it has been a pretty good time, satisfying cleaning, interesting mystery and plot!
With that said it does have its fair share of clunkiness, I am currently stuck on a level where the task of cleaning up garbage is left undone, as i physically could not get a pool triangle into the bin. I tried resetting, putting it in first before other items etc, no luck. So far it seems the only way to succeed there is to get the little roomba skill in game to clean it for you. Other than that one little thing I have had a great time progressing in.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and we are happy to hear that you are having a great time progressing. Regarding the bug you mentioned, we are looking into it and it will be resolved within 24-48 hours and we will push an update :)

reviews.review_description: Interesting game with a good concept (Cleaner, crime scene cleaner). I like the overall idea, and it’s fun to play. However, it definitely needs some polish and a bit more work.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Wiped Clean! We're excited to share that we're actively working on adding new content and further polishing the game. We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed playing, and we truly appreciate your support!
